title: Villager Rafts
description: Adds stranded Villagers drifting across the oceans on wooden rafts.
body:
**This mod adds stranded Villagers drifting across the oceans on wooden rafts.**
![Raft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/452d8b01d36c9d5ae3a72797892c8e90a0146fd8.jpeg)

- Villagers of different professions can be found on these rafts.

![Raft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6142739c89a98fd1959e22181dc3e79e8ec87be0.jpeg)

- The rafts are nicely detailed, and you’ll also find some ocean themed loot on them.

![Raft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/59989738bf7c98c5ae9fb2e15dcbdbb93cbfc718.jpeg)

- They spawn in all types of ocean biomes.

**Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks**
